body:
This is actually our favourite couch we’ve ever had! 
Maybe because we tested and picked it out together, maybe because it feels like a cloud or maybe because I feel stress-free actually living life with kids on it ☁️ 
The @Cozey Ciello XL was made for real life (and real messes) and we’re here for it. 
Plus the Tessella Coffee Table and a one-seater are perfect for those moments when a hot coffee is actually enjoyed ☕️

#CozeyPartner

body:
If you’ve been thinking about a @cozeyca couch, here’s our honest review after living with this couch for a bit: #ad 
✔ dangerously comfortable
✔ storage we actually use
✔ dog-friendly setup approved by Ollie
✔ makes leaving the house harder than it should be

So yeah… zero regrets 😌 their new store is now open in Calgary on 17th Ave so you can check out all the options in person! #CozeyPartner

#ad #cozeypartner ☁️ Just when I thought my bedroom couldn’t get any cozier…I designed my dream bed with @cozey ‘s new Ara bed system. 

As someone who primarily works from home, my bed gets used for more than just sleeping, so I want it to feel like me. And talk about easy assembly… I put most of it together completely by myself (without a single crash out!!)

From now on, if you need me, you know where I’ll be 😌
